CustomField.description: Uncollected pledge remainder written off when a pledge is Partially Posted (JSI-82 Option B). A custom field is used instead of NPSP native write-off, because reducing Amount to the collected total while also using native write-off would drive Remaining Balance negative. PENDING CLIENT CONFIRMATION (Option A/B/C). Added for JSI-82. Author: Jason Ott.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Portion of the original pledge that was not collected and has been written off.
CustomField.label: Pledge Written Off
